 {"id":"gt-9t14","title":"Wire up --wisp flag for ephemeral molecules","description":"The --wisp flag exists in gt sling but isn't wired through to bd mol.

Need:
1. bd mol run --wisp - spawn to .beads-wisp/ instead of .beads/
2. Automatic burn on molecule completion
3. Optional squash to digest for audit trail

Currently:
- sling.go sets thing.IsWisp but never uses it
- bd mol run has no --wisp flag
- .beads-wisp/ exists but nothing writes to it","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-22T13:12:25.192854-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-22T13:18:50.72531-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-22T13:18:50.72531-08:00","close_reason":"Wired --wisp flag: uses .beads-wisp/ storage when available, propagates IsWisp through MoleculeContext"}
 {"id":"gt-9uxr","title":"Critical packages lack test coverage","description":"Several packages have no test files:
- internal/lock/ - Core identity locking (212 lines UNTESTED)
- internal/witness/ - Worker monitoring
- internal/mrqueue/ - MR queue management
- internal/claude/ - Claude integration
- internal/style/ - Terminal styling
- internal/constants/ - Constants

Priority for testing:
1. lock/ - prevents duplicate agents, critical for correctness
2. witness/ - agent lifecycle management
3. mrqueue/ - merge request processing

Overall: 37 test files for 160 Go files (23% by file count)","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-24T12:51:01.154427-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-24T12:51:01.154427-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-9uxr","depends_on_id":"gt-jo9n","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-24T12:52:07.558885-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
+{"id":"gt-9uy0","title":"Remove 'spawn' terminology from molecular chemistry","description":"'Spawn' should ONLY be used for polecats (workers). Molecules use different verbs:
- pour: create mol from proto
- run: execute molecule
- bond: attach molecule to something

Found ~100+ instances of 'bd mol spawn' or 'spawn' used with molecules:

**Docs needing updates:**
- prompts/roles/deacon.md: 'bd mol spawn mol-deacon-patrol'
- docs/molecular-chemistry.md: 'Spawn Mol', 'Spawn Wisp'
- docs/molecule-algebra.md: 'Spawn as Mol when...'
- docs/sling-design.md: 'Spawns from proto'
- docs/chemistry-design-changes.md: references 'bd mol spawn'
- docs/architecture.md: 'spawn workers on molecules'
- docs/vision.md: 'Spawn + attach'

**Templates needing updates:**
- internal/templates/roles/deacon.md.tmpl: 'bd mol spawn'
- internal/templates/roles/witness.md.tmpl: 'gt mol spawn'
- internal/templates/roles/polecat.md.tmpl: 'spawned' (ok for polecat)
- internal/templates/roles/mayor.md.tmpl: context ok

**Code needing updates:**
- internal/cmd/prime.go: 'bd mol spawn' calls (~6 instances)
- internal/cmd/sling.go: spawnMoleculeFromProto, spawnMoleculeOnIssue function names

**Correct terminology:**
- gt spawn = spawn polecat (OK)
- bd pour / bd run = create molecule from proto
- bd mol bond = attach molecule
- 'instantiate' in docs = OK

This is P1 because docs showing non-existent commands will confuse users.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-24T13:06:43.805547-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-24T13:06:43.805547-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-9uy0","depends_on_id":"gt-jo9n","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-24T13:06:49.341648-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"gt-9wv0","title":"gt spawn should verify daemon is running for polecat triggering","description":"gt spawn notifies the Deacon (via mail) that a polecat was started, expecting the Deacon to trigger it once Claude is ready. But if the daemon isn't running, the mail sits unread and the polecat never gets triggered.

## Current Behavior
1. gt spawn starts polecat session
2. gt spawn sends POLECAT_STARTED to deacon/
3. (assumes daemon will trigger polecat)

## Problem
If gt daemon isn't running, step 3 never happens and polecat sits at prompt.

## Solution
In gt spawn, after session start:
1. Check if daemon is running (gt daemon status)
2. If not running, either:
   a. Start daemon: gt daemon start
   b. Or warn user: 'Daemon not running, polecat may not auto-start'

## Alternative
The user can manually trigger with gt nudge, but automated flow should work.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-23T01:03:03.71521-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-23T01:03:03.71521-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-9wv0","depends_on_id":"gt-bjft","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-23T01:03:12.187224-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"gt-9za0","title":"Mol Mall: Molecule marketplace distribution","description":"Design the Mol Mall distribution mechanism for sharing molecules.

## Core Insight

Mol Mall is just a registry of molecules.jsonl fragments. No special format needed.

## Distribution Model

```
Mol Mall (registry)
    │
    │ bd mol search "security"
    ▼
Molecule catalog (searchable index)
    │
    │ bd mol install mol-security-scan
    ▼
Download molecules.jsonl fragment
    │
    │ Append to ~/.beads/molecules.jsonl
    ▼
Available locally: bd mol list
```

## Registry Format

Simple JSON index served from HTTPS:

```json
{
  "molecules": [
    {
      "id": "mol-security-scan",
      "title": "Security Scan",
      "description": "OWASP Top 10 vulnerability checker",
      "labels": ["plugin", "code-review", "tier:sonnet"],
      "author": "anthropic",
      "version": "1.0.0",
      "url": "https://mol-mall.anthropic.com/molecules/mol-security-scan.jsonl"
    }
  ]
}
```

## CLI Commands

```bash
bd mol search <query>           # Search registry
bd mol info <id>                # Show molecule details
bd mol install <id>             # Download and install
bd mol uninstall <id>           # Remove from catalog
bd mol update                   # Update all installed molecules
```

## Installation Locations

```
~/.beads/molecules.jsonl        # User-level (default install location)
~/gt/.beads/molecules.jsonl     # Town-level (shared across rigs)
.beads/molecules.jsonl          # Project-level (team-specific)
```

## Version Management

Molecules can have versions via labels: `version:1.0.0`
Install specific version: `bd mol install mol-security-scan@1.0.0`

## Auth (Future)

Private registries could require auth token.
Enterprise Mol Malls for internal distribution.

## Related

- gt-u818: Plugin System (plugins ARE molecules)
- molecular-chemistry.md: Format documentation","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-23T05:14:35.698369-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-23T05:14:35.698369-08:00"}
